title: [phase:simulate] [family:github-implement-path] [provider_hint:codex] Simulate the execution path for /vote-related implementation through scripts/gha24 and .github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml. Identify exactly where Codex-only execution begins and what artifacts or gates would be needed to...
summary_text: - `scripts/gha24` is the issue seeding step, not the `/vote` transport. It creates the issue, adds `implement` + `implement-confirmed`, embeds the preflight/dialogue protocol in the body, and applies the `tutti` label that starts orchestration. See [scripts/gha24](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/gha24#L310). - `/vote` enters later through workflow dispatch, not from `gha24`: the bridge passes `vote_instruction_b64` and `vote_command` into `fugue-tutti-caller`, and the caller forwards that as `extra_issue_instruction` into Tutti. See [fugue-bridge-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/fugue-bridge-handoff.sh#L121), [fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L33), [fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L523). - Multi-agent adjudication is still intact inside Tutti: `run-agents` fans out the provider matrix, appends the `/vote` instruction into the effective issue body, uploads `agent-result-*`, and `integrate` computes `ok_to_execute`. That is the last cross-provider decision point. See [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L588), [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L665), [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1287). - Codex-only execution begins in two senses: 1. Control-plane boundary: when `fugue-tutti-caller` sees `needs.tutti.outputs.ok_to_execute == 'true'` and calls the reusable implement workflow; only scalar outputs are forwarded, not the raw adjudication artifacts. See [fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L735). 2. Actual executor boundary: inside the reusable workflow, the first implementation work is already Codex-only in `Run parallel preflight nodes`, and the main patch generation is a single `codex exec --full-auto`. See [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L641), [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L813), [codex-execute-validate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/codex-execute-validate.sh#L225). - The current implementation path does not preserve `/vote` adjudication through completion. `fugue-codex-implement` re-fetches only the issue title/body, so the transient `/vote` instruction is dropped, and the remaining gates are structural self-checks on Codex-authored markdown artifacts plus credential/peripheral preflights. Commit/push/PR happen immediately after that. See [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L199), [codex-execute-validate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/codex-execute-validate.sh#L241), [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L849). - To preserve multi-agent adjudication through completion, the workflow needs three things: 1. Carry-forward artifacts: pass `vote_instruction`, raw `agent-result-*`, and the integrated vote/threshold/high-risk summary into `fugue-codex-implement` as downloadable artifacts or explicit inputs. 2. Binding gate before merge output: add a second Tutti-style review stage on the produced diff/branch before `Commit changes` / `Create Pull Request`, and require weighted pass + no `HIGH` risk on the actual patch, not just on the issue text. 3. Stronger preflight semantics: treat degraded Codex preflight node fallbacks as non-passing for adjudication, because today those files are just fallback seeds and not independent reviewer evidence. See [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator...
